title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Delhi Motor Vehicles Taxation Act, 1962. (2) It extends to the whole of the Union territory of Delhi. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the 2[Administrator] may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st April, 1963, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1254 (E), dated 18th September, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). 2. Subs. by Act 17 of 1983, s. 2, for "Chief Commissioner" (w.e.f. 1-12-1983).
